rationale.R1.4: The critique identifies multiple prior works (ESMValTool, MDTF) and articulates specific deltas, fulfilling the highest anchor.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing key citations with precision, meeting the top anchor for citation audit.
rationale.RX.1: Explicitly marks uncertainties regarding prior work coverage and potential downstream addressing of issues.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays strictly within the requested scope of critiquing the introduction paragraph.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors introduced; avoids regressions entirely.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but lacks annotation for minor edits, fitting the middle anchor.
